programme.title: A Body in the Basement
programme.desc: A killer brutally murders well-known community activist and member of the gay community Dennis Dolinger in the basement of his Washington, D.C., home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Who Hired the Hitman?
programme.desc: The assassination of a computer genius sends detectives on a two-decade hunt for missing gold, uncovers a shocking link to a Saudi sheik, and exposes a deadly international scheme that claims another life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Who Hired the Hitman?
programme.desc: The midnight murder of a snow plowman puts his friends on edge as their tiny town struggles to root out the culprit; police find a clue on the victim's forehead that may be the killer's calling card.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Who Hired the Hitman?
programme.desc: For a year, NYPD follows a bloody trail of murder attempts against a real estate entrepreneur, only to discover that no one is who they seem; the victim has ties to a mob family, and the mastermind is closer than they realized.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Who Hired the Hitman?
programme.desc: After a farmer is found dead on his kitchen floor, everyone on the property becomes a suspect in a complicated investigation that leads to a shocking discovery.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fatal Vows
programme.desc: A minister's son, Luther, falls hard for Anita, the daughter of a pastor; then, failure delivers a crushing blow to their relationship, turning their heavenly life into hell on Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fatal Vows
programme.desc: When Tim meets Maryann at a Catholic mixer, it's a match made in heaven, but while the future looks bright, a dark cloud gathers on the horizon in the person of Tim's ex-wife.

programme.title: Fatal Vows
programme.desc: Eric gives up the U.S. Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and falls for Constance on a blind date; these two "foodies" indulge in the sweet life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: An aspiring Olympic equestrian finds a solution to her financial woes; a young divorcee decides to get rid of her ex-husband for good; a greedy woman sets her eyes on a wealthy widower for her next victim.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: A high school teacher stages her husband's murder to cash in on his life insurance; a woman takes measures to eliminate her lover's wife and child; a serial monogamist grows tired of her fourth husband.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: When a U.S. Air Force veteran dies unexpectedly, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team must determine whether the death was the result of a tragic accident or premeditated murder; before long, the team discovers their clean-cut victim lead a secret life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: After two young men are found shot in an apartment hallway, Lt. Joe Kenda must rely on his inner lie detector to figure out which victim is being deceptive; police investigate a murder in broad daylight and nearly get killed themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Two best friends are gunned down on a dark residential street; when a string of disappointments threaten to derail the case, Lt. Joe Kenda enlists the help of an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: A Hollywood Demons Event
programme.desc: Interviews with boy band members including Boyz II Men, Backstreet Boys and NSYNC discuss aspects of manufactured superstardom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Boy Band Confidential: A Hollywood Demons Event
programme.desc: NSYNC's Joey Fatone exposes the secret machinery behind manufactured superstardom - and its devastating human cost. Candid interviews with artists from Boyz II Men, 98 Degrees, and others reveal the darker realities of power struggles and exploitation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: "Hollywood Demons" pulls back the curtain of fame to expose the hidden struggles, sacrifices and scandals of life in the spotlight. From the seemingly cursed dynasties to iconic figures and series plagued by peril and misfortune, this new series unveils the shadowy underbelly of Hollywood. Each episode features accounts from Hollywood insiders, project collaborators, and survivors. Insight and perspective are provided by addiction specialist, Dr. Drew Pinsky and culture writer, Scaachi Koul.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Hollywood Demons
programme.desc: "Hollywood Demons" pulls back the curtain of fame to expose the hidden struggles, sacrifices and scandals of life in the spotlight. From the seemingly cursed dynasties to iconic figures and series plagued by peril and misfortune, this new series unveils the shadowy underbelly of Hollywood. Each episode features accounts from Hollywood insiders, project collaborators, and survivors. Insight and perspective are provided by addiction specialist, Dr. Drew Pinsky and culture writer, Scaachi Koul.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: When a local resident of Dunlap, Tenn., is picking up cans, he makes the shocking discovery of a murder; authorities piece together the crime.

programme.desc: A lively slumber party turns into a nightmare when a loving mother, her young daughter, and her daughter's friend are murdered.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: A mother notices that her son is dark and detached and occasionally reveals to her fantasies of violence towards his own family. She begins to wonder if her once-happy, sweet boy is evil, but could never imagine the true terror her son would become.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: After a young woman vanishes on her way to work, police desperately follow a trail of videotaped clues they hope will solve a complex mystery; the evidence found inside her car could be the key to solving the brazen abduction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police investigating the murder of a young woman start to wonder if the ambush-style shooting that ended the victim's life resulted from a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: When a Mother's Day killing horrifies a town, investigators discover the psychopath has struck before; realizing that any woman could be his next victim, predicting the killer's next move hinges on understanding what motivates a monster.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Before They Kill Again
programme.desc: As Washington, DC burns, police realise they are hunting the most prolific arsonist in US history, and he has been getting away with it for decades.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Andy Castillo uses the internet to call and text female realtors in 20 different states; wielding their social media against them, he makes the women believe he's lurking nearby, adding to their terror.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Online cult leader Sherry Shriner reaches her followers through YouTube videos and keeps them in line via her Facebook page; when a group member dies in a tragic shooting, attention turns to Sherry and the control she wields over her followers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: Fourteen-year-old Aubrey Peal uses an app to find others interested in gaming; he strikes up an online friendship with a man named Jason, who claims he is suicidal; concerned, Aubrey agrees to meet Jason, not realizing his evil intentions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Devil in the Web
programme.desc: CeCe bonds with a man she meets on a dating app and she happily obliges when he asks her for money for his business, but she becomes yet another victim of a romance scam.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: Stunning actress Victoria Vetri becomes Playmate of the Year in 1968; just a year later, followers of Charles Manson brutally murder her close friend Sharon Tate; the crime sets in motion a series of events that ends in Victoria's tragic downfall.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: After she's fired from the police department, 19-year-old Laurie Bembenek becomes a Playboy Bunny; when her new husband's ex-wife dies, Laurie is painted as a femme fatale and convicted of murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: In the late '90s, Playboy twins Sandy and Mandy Bentley's fame soars until an affair with a Vegas High Roller leads to a fall from fame, stolen jewels, a shadowy buyer and a brutal double murder in the Hollywood hills.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: A 19-year-old is discovered in Canada; after becoming "Playmate of the Year," her husband sees dollar signs, but as her star rises, she's drawn to another man; afraid of losing his meal ticket, her husband shoots them in their home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lethally Blonde
programme.desc: An aspiring model, Kimberly Pandelios, accepts an offer to pose in lingerie for a mysterious photographer, then disappears; years later, a young woman contacts the police when she begins to suspect that her boyfriend may have been the killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
